overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character in a futuristic exosuit traversing a desolate, rain-lashed coastline. The character walks along rocky cliffs and dark beaches while heavy rain and fog obscure distant wrecked structures, creating a melancholic, isolated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal cliffside path between mountain and ocean

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow rocky trail between the steep mountainside and the stormy ocean, heading toward the distant wreckage

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with loose stones and dark wet surfaces rising to the left
churning dark water with whitecaps visible through the rain and fog
large destroyed vessel or industrial wreckage visible through the mist across the water
narrow uneven path of loose rocks and gravel along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky path hugging the coastline, with a steep rocky mountainside rising on the left and stormy dark ocean waters visible through heavy rain on the right. In the far distance across the water, the silhouette of massive wrecked structures is barely visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark gravel beach along stormy coastline

events.description: character descends from the rocky cliffside onto the dark gravel beach
large jagged rock formations become clearly visible ahead on the beach

agents.ego_description: walking along the dark beach with the wrecked ship still visible across the water, approaching the rock formations ahead

entered.detail: expanse of dark volcanic sand and gravel replacing the rocky trail
massive jagged rock outcroppings and pillars rising from the beach ahead

segments.scene_description: Having descended onto the beach, the character now walks across dark volcanic sand with the ocean closer on the right. The rocky mountainside recedes into the distance on the left while massive rock formations become visible ahead through the rain, and the wrecked ship remains visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area with massive coastal rock formations

events.description: character turns right to face and approach the tall rock formations

agents.ego_description: turning toward the massive rock formations and walking past them, observing the jagged pillars rising from the beach

entered.detail: tall thin rock spire visible in the distance among the formations

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward the massive rock formations, walking past towering jagged rocks that rise from the dark beach. The wrecked ship and mountain cliffside are now behind as the character explores the shoreline dominated by these ancient stone pillars, with rain continuing to fall heavily.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a precarious cliffside path down to a desolate volcanic beach dominated by towering rock formations. It begins with the character navigating a narrow rocky trail hugged by a steep mountainside on the left and a stormy ocean on the right, where massive wrecked structures loom faintly through heavy rain and fog. As the character descends, the scene shifts to a wide expanse of dark volcanic sand, causing the mountainside to recede while the distant wreckage remains visible across the churning water. The camera then follows the character as they turn away from the coast and move toward the interior of the beach, passing between jagged, ancient stone pillars that rise sharply from the shore. Finally, the cliffside and ship fade into the background as the character explores the shoreline under a relentless downpour of rain.
